narrative: A Senior Data Scientist at Flipkart with 6 years of experience, this candidate ranked 13th due to their exceptional verified skill depth. Their background in a product company and skills in PyTorch, NLP, and search technologies like Elasticsearch and OpenSearch align well with the JD. Their experience level also fits the target band. However, their location in Delhi may pose a challenge for the preferred Pune or Noida locations, and minor concerns were flagged regarding their profile credibility.
